title: OwO What's this?
description: Is your Minecraft world lacking in a little bit of OwO? This pack adds said lack of OwO.
body:
Have you ever wanted more OwO in your Minecraft? You look around your Minecraft world and just say to yourself "man this really lacks some OwO"? No? Well, do I have the solution for you! Spice up your Minecraft experience with the copious amounts of OwO nobody asked for.

This amazing modpack adds an OwO face to just about everything.

Still in development.
